lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the engine, transmission, and all systems are in perfect working order.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age. The interior is clean and well-maintained. All mechanical systems are reliable and in good working order.

Roll up your sleeves and get ready for a rewarding project! This vehicle is a fantastic opportunity for a DIY enthusiast or someone looking for a budget-friendly restoration project. While it is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a great foundation for those who love to bring cars back to life. Grab this diamond in the rough and make it your own today!
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owner. The exterior retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor rock chips on the front bumper and a small door ding on the passenger side. Inside, the upholstery is clean and free of tears, and all electronic features are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is sound, having received regular oil changes and a recent inspection that confirmed the engine and transmission are performing as they should. It offers a reliable and comfortable driving experience for anyone looking for a solid pre-owned vehicle.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold as a functional, reliable driver that shows clear signs of its age. The exterior paint has lost some of its original luster, with several noticeable scratches, minor door dings, and a small patch of surface rust starting on the rear wheel well. Inside, the cabin shows moderate wear, including some staining on the carpets and a small tear in the driver's seat upholstery, though all major controls and the climate system are working properly. While the engine and transmission are sound, the car will likely need a new set of tires and a suspension tune-up soon to maintain optimal ride quality. This is an ideal choice for someone looking for a dependable vehicle at an accessible price point who doesn't mind some cosmetic and minor mechanical upkeep.

We are pleased to present this automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity synonymous with showroom delivery. Every detail reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in truly superlative condition. We invite you to experience this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for a new home! This car is in absolute pristine condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, always kept it garaged and sparkling clean. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with you. You really have to see it to believe how perfect it is!

Offered here is a pristine 1994 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S) in collector-grade condition. This example features the legendary 13B-REW rotary engine, still utilizing its original sequential twin-turbocharger configuration to deliver linear boost across the rev range. The chassis maintains its factory 50/50 weight distribution, paired with a crisp 5-speed manual transmission and a Torsen limited-slip differential. Recent comprehensive maintenance includes a full cooling system overhaul and verified compression numbers that meet factory specifications. The suspension remains tight, utilizing its signature four-wheel double-wishbone setup for unmatched cornering precision. With zero modifications to the powertrain or ECU, this FD represents a rare opportunity to own a pure, unmolested apex-carver in its most refined state.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership and preservation. This car is in pristine, showroom condition, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and shielded from the elements throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings, and sits on flawless alloy wheels wrapped in premium tires. Inside, the cabin is an oasis of luxury; the leather upholstery remains supple and unmarked, the carpets are protected by original floor mats, and every electronic feature—from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions with precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, offering a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was manufactured. It comes with a complete, documented service history from certified technicians, all original keys, and the owner's manual. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a modern classic in its peak form.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presented in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach. Every surface, from the flawless paintwork to the pristine upholstery, reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. We invite the most discerning buyers to inspect this peerless example of engineering excellence.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative caliber, this specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior finish and interior appointments remain in showroom-original state. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering provides an unparalleled ownership experience. It is, quite simply, without peer in the current market.

Hi everyone! Check out this absolute beauty! I’m honestly so sad to let her go, but she’s looking for a new home. This car is in pristine, mint condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied this ride from day one, so you're getting a real gem. Come see it for yourself, you won't be disappointed!

Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches. Clean title. Mechanically perfect.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained to showroom standards. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish free of stone chips or swirl marks, further preserved by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Step inside to an interior that looks and smells brand new; the premium leather upholstery shows no bolster wear, and every electronic component operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance and strictly climate-controlled garage storage. With exceptionally low mileage and a smooth, powerful performance, this is a rare opportunity to own a turn-key, collector-grade vehicle.

Presenting a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This specimen boasts a pristine subframe and a fully serviced VANOS system, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency and linear power delivery to the rear-mounted variable M differential lock. The ZF 6-speed manual transmission offers crisp, tactile engagement, while the suspension geometry remains factory-spec with zero bushing deflection. Meticulously maintained with a comprehensive service history, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of analog driver engagement, free from any mechanical fatigue or cosmetic degradation.
Mint condition. One owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service history.

This vehicle is a true showroom masterpiece, meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections, while the interior remains in pristine condition, retaining its original factory scent and supple leather texture. Every mechanical component has been proactively serviced, with a complete history of records documenting its flawless performance. Always stored in a climate-controlled garage and never exposed to inclement weather, this car drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new vehicle. It represents a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own an example that looks and feels as though it just rolled off the assembly line.

Hey there! I am honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it truly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it still has that fresh, new-car vibe and runs like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for an adventure, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you definitely won’t be disappointed!

Offering a museum-grade example of a naturally aspirated icon. This vehicle features a high-revving power plant with documented compression numbers and a seamless six-speed close-ratio gearbox. The drivetrain is anchored by a factory-optioned limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution through every corner. Meticulously preserved, the chassis exhibits zero fatigue, benefiting from a comprehensive suspension refresh using OEM+ polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers. From the pristine cylinder head to the untouched undercarriage, this car maintains its factory tolerances and mechanical integrity. A true turnkey investment for the purist seeking visceral performance and flawless aesthetics.
Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean interior. Service history included.

This is an exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that has been meticulously maintained to an uncompromising standard. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips or imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any wear or creasing, and the interior still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Every electronic component and feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, offering a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and smooth. It has been strictly garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and comes with a comprehensive, documented service history. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly pristine example for the most discerning enthusiast.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting negligible wear and reflecting the highest level of mechanical and aesthetic preservation. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.
